metadata.title: PickMyNews — Strategic Intelligence for Investment Funds
metadata.description: Personalized newsletter synthesizing essential ecosystem news. Designed for VC, PE, and Growth Equity professionals.
metadata.keywords: investment intelligence, fund newsletter, VC news, PE monitoring, business intelligence, professional newsletter, strategic watch

hero.headline: VC & PE news,
hero.trustSatisfied: Built specifically for VC & PE funds

painPoints.title: Too much noise, not enough signal.
painPoints.card1Desc: Your inbox overflows with content you don't have time to read.
painPoints.card2Desc: Most articles don't relate to your thesis or portfolio.
painPoints.card3Desc: Important signals slip through the cracks.
painPoints.card4Desc: Hours spent monitoring instead of decision-making.

howItWorks.title: Up and running in 3 steps
howItWorks.subtitle: A dedicated onboarding to configure your newsletter based on your thesis and ecosystem.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Share your investment thesis, portfolio, and areas of interest.
howItWorks.step1Placeholder: E.g.: Series A B2B SaaS startups in Europe
howItWorks.step2Desc: Our algorithm aggregates hundreds of sources and keeps only what's relevant.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Every week, a concise and personalized newsletter in your inbox.

benefits.title: One newsletter. All the information that matters.
benefits.subtitle: PickMyNews aggregates, filters, and summarizes news from hundreds of sources to send you only what's relevant to your fund.
benefits.benefit1Desc: Each newsletter is configured around your thesis, sectors, and geography.
benefits.benefit2Desc: The essentials in a 5-minute read. No noise, no fluff.
benefits.benefit3Desc: Hundreds of media outlets, blogs, and publications aggregated for a complete view.
benefits.benefit4Desc: Same topic covered by multiple sources? We synthesize it into a single point.
benefits.benefit5Desc: No editorial line. Facts, verified and sourced, without opinion filters.
benefits.benefit6Desc: A fixed appointment, on the day and time that suits your team.

testimonials.title: Adopted by the most demanding funds

faq.title: Your questions
faq.subtitle: Answers to the most common questions from our prospects.
faq.a0: After booking a call, we organize a 15-minute meeting to understand your investment thesis, target sectors, and preferences. We then configure your newsletter and send a first test edition within 48 hours.
faq.q1: How many newsletters can we receive per week?
faq.a1: One newsletter per week, sent on the day and time of your choice. Each team member can have their own configuration.
faq.q2: Where do the articles come from? Are they reliable?
faq.a2: We aggregate hundreds of quality sources: specialized media (TechCrunch, Les Echos, Financial Times...), expert blogs, academic publications, sector newsletters. Every fact is systematically verified. Sources are listed for full transparency.
faq.q3: How do I contact the PickMyNews team?
faq.a3: Our team is available by email at <email>contact@pickmynews.com</email> and responds within 24 hours.
faq.q4: What happens if information is inaccurate?
faq.a4: We stand by our quality: if you find a factually incorrect figure or data in your newsletter, we correct it immediately and adjust our verification processes. That's our quality guarantee.

finalCta.title: Never miss what matters.
finalCta.subtitle: Join the funds that simplified their monitoring with PickMyNews.

footer.tagline: Strategic intelligence for investment funds. A personalized newsletter, without noise or distraction.

privacyPage.metaDescription: Privacy Policy for PickMyNews - How we collect, use, and protect your data.
privacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPage.intro: PickMyNews ("we", "us", "our") provides an automated strategic monitoring and newsletter service for investment professionals, available at pickmynews.com. This Privacy Policy explains what data we collect, how we use it, and how we protect it.
privacyPage.section1Intro: We may collect the following categories of data:
section1_1Items: Billing information (processed securely by our payment provider)
section1_3Items: Imported RSS feeds, links or keywords
privacyPage.section1_4Text: All payment details (cards, billing info) are processed exclusively by Stripe.
privacyPage.section1_4Strong: We never store or access your credit card details.
section2Items: Provide automated monitoring and newsletter services
Personalize your dashboards, alerts and reports
Send administrative emails (invoices, notifications, important updates)
privacyPage.section3Intro: We process your data based on:
section3Items: The performance of a contract (your subscription)
privacyPage.section4Intro: We may share your data only with:
section4Items: Service providers (hosting, analytics, email delivery, payment processing)
privacyPage.section5Text: Data is hosted in the EU or compliant regions depending on our providers.
privacyPage.section6Intro: You may request at any time:
privacyPage.section7Text: You may disable cookies in your browser settings, but some features may be limited.
privacyPage.section8Text: Your data is stored for the duration of your account and deleted within 30 days after closure, except when required by law (e.g., invoices).
privacyPage.section9Text: Each service has its own privacy policy.

termsPage.metaDescription: Terms of Service for PickMyNews - Rules and conditions for using our service.
termsPage.title: Terms of Service
termsPage.intro: By using PickMyNews ("the Service"), you agree to the following Terms of Service.
termsPage.section1Text: PickMyNews provides automated news monitoring, content aggregation, and newsletter generation tools for investment professionals. The service is offered as-is and may evolve over time.
termsPage.section2Text: You must be at least 18 years old to use this service.
section3Items: Maintaining the confidentiality of your login credentials
All activity occurring under your account
termsPage.section3Text: We may suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms.
section4Items: Commercial terms are defined in the service contract.
Billing is monthly or annual as per the contract.
Prices may be updated; the client will be notified in advance.
No refunds except where required by law.
section5Items: Automate scraping in ways that violate third-party terms
Use AI features for illegal or unethical activities
Attempt to hack, overload, or reverse-engineer the service
termsPage.section5Text: We may terminate accounts engaging in prohibited activities.
termsPage.section6Text: All content, design, and technology of PickMyNews are our exclusive property. You retain ownership of the content you input (feeds, links, keywords, documents).
termsPage.section7Intro: Within the limits of applicable law:
section7Items: We are not liable for any indirect or consequential damages
The service is provided "as is" without guarantee of uninterrupted availability
termsPage.section8Text: You may cancel anytime. We may suspend or terminate your access for violations of these Terms.
termsPage.section9Text: These Terms are governed by French law.

legalNoticePage.metaDescription: Legal notices for PickMyNews website - Information about the publisher, host, and terms of use.
legalNoticePage.title: Legal Notices
legalNoticePage.section1Intro: In accordance with Article 6 of Law No. 2004-575 of June 21, 2004 on confidence in the digital economy, users of the PickMyNews.com website are informed of the identity of the various parties involved in its creation and monitoring:
legalNoticePage.section2Title: 2. General Terms of Use of the Website and Services
legalNoticePage.section2Text1: Use of the PickMyNews.com website implies full acceptance of the general terms of use described below. These terms of use may be modified or supplemented at any time; users of the website are therefore invited to consult them regularly.
legalNoticePage.section2Text2: The PickMyNews.com website is normally accessible to users at all times. However, an interruption for technical maintenance may be decided by PickMyNews, who will then endeavor to communicate the dates and times of the intervention to users in advance.
legalNoticePage.section2Text3: The website is regularly updated. Similarly, the legal notices may be modified at any time: they are nevertheless binding on the user, who is invited to refer to them as often as possible.
legalNoticePage.section3Text1: The purpose of the PickMyNews.com website is to provide information about the strategic intelligence and professional newsletter generation services offered by PickMyNews to investment funds.
legalNoticePage.section3Text2: PickMyNews strives to provide information that is as accurate as possible. However, it cannot be held responsible for omissions, inaccuracies, or deficiencies in updates, whether caused by itself or by third-party partners.
legalNoticePage.section3Text3: All information provided on the PickMyNews.com website is for informational purposes only and may change. Furthermore, the information on the website is not exhaustive and may have been modified since it was posted online.
legalNoticePage.section4Text1: The website uses modern web technologies (JavaScript, frontend frameworks, APIs).
legalNoticePage.section4Text2: The website cannot be held responsible for material damage related to its use. Users agree to access the website using up-to-date equipment, free of viruses, and with an updated browser.
legalNoticePage.section5Text1: PickMyNews owns the intellectual property rights or holds the usage rights to all elements accessible on the website, including: texts, images, graphics, logos, icons, sounds, and software.
legalNoticePage.section5Text2: Any reproduction, representation, modification, publication, or adaptation of all or part of the elements of the website, by any means or process whatsoever, is prohibited without prior written authorization from PickMyNews.
legalNoticePage.section5Text3: Any unauthorized use of the website or any of its elements will be considered as constituting counterfeiting and may be subject to legal proceedings in accordance with Articles L.335-2 and following of the Intellectual Property Code.
legalNoticePage.section6Text1: PickMyNews cannot be held responsible for direct or indirect damage caused to the user's equipment when accessing the PickMyNews.com website, resulting from either:
section6Items: the use of equipment that does not meet the specifications indicated in section 4,
the occurrence of a bug or incompatibility,
non-compliant or abusive use of the service.
legalNoticePage.section6Text2: PickMyNews also cannot be held responsible for indirect damages (such as loss of market or loss of opportunity) resulting from the use of the website.
legalNoticePage.section6Text3: Interactive spaces may be made available to users (contact form). PickMyNews reserves the right to delete without notice any content that violates applicable legislation (racist, defamatory, insulting, pornographic, etc.). PickMyNews also reserves the right to hold the user civilly and/or criminally liable.
legalNoticePage.section7Text1: In France, personal data is protected by Law No. 78-17 of January 6, 1978 as amended, Law No. 2004-801 of August 6, 2004, Article L.226-13 of the Penal Code, and the GDPR.
legalNoticePage.section7Text2: When using the PickMyNews.com website, the following may be collected:
section7Items1: the URL of links used to access the website,
browsing data (pages viewed, connection time, etc.),
legalNoticePage.section7Text3: PickMyNews only collects personal information about the user for the purpose of certain services offered by the website. The user provides this information knowingly.
legalNoticePage.section7Text4: In accordance with the GDPR, all users have the right to access, rectify, delete, object to, and port their data. Requests must be made by email to:
legalNoticePage.section7Text5: No personal information of the website user is published, exchanged, transferred, or sold to third parties without the user's consent. In the event of PickMyNews being acquired, the data could be transferred to the acquirer who would be subject to the same obligations.
legalNoticePage.section7Text6: Databases are protected by the Law of July 1, 1998 transposing Directive 96/9 on the legal protection of databases.
legalNoticePage.section8Text1: The PickMyNews.com website may contain hypertext links to other websites. PickMyNews has no means of verifying all the content of the websites thus visited and assumes no responsibility in this regard.
legalNoticePage.section8Text2: Browsing the website may result in cookies being installed on the user's computer. These cookies record information relating to browsing.
legalNoticePage.section8Text3: Refusing to install a cookie may make certain services unavailable.
legalNoticePage.section8Text4: Cookie blocking methods depend on the browser (Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge, etc.). Users can consult their browser documentation to adjust settings.
legalNoticePage.section9Text: Any dispute relating to the use of the PickMyNews.com website is subject to French law. Exclusive jurisdiction is attributed to the competent French courts.
section10Items: Law No. 78-17 of January 6, 1978 as amended, relating to data processing, files, and freedoms.
Law No. 2004-575 of June 21, 2004 on confidence in the digital economy.
legalNoticePage.lexiqueUserDef: Internet user connecting to and using the website.
legalNoticePage.lexiquePersonalDef: "information that allows, in any form whatsoever, directly or indirectly, the identification of the natural persons to whom it applies".

cgvPage.metaDescription: General Terms of Sale for PickMyNews - Rules and conditions for using our service.
cgvPage.title: General Terms of Sale
cgvPage.intro: PickMyNews provides a professional strategic intelligence service enabling investment funds and their teams to access automated editorial content ("PickMyNews Content") sent by email in the form of personalized newsletters at a contractually defined frequency.
cgvPage.intro2: These General Terms of Sale govern your use of our service. In these Terms, "PickMyNews service", "our service" or "the service" refers to the personalized digital service provided by PickMyNews to discover, receive, and view editorial content, including all features, recommendations, web interfaces, dashboards, automation features, as well as all content and software associated with our service.
cgvPage.intro3: The reference to "you" refers to the client company that subscribed to the PickMyNews service and the designated contact(s) for newsletter delivery.
cgvPage.section1_1Text: Your PickMyNews subscription continues until termination. To use PickMyNews, you must have Internet access, provide a valid email address, and provide us with one or more valid payment methods. Unless cancelled before the billing date, you authorize us to charge the subscription fees for the next billing cycle (see "Termination" section).
cgvPage.section1_2Text: PickMyNews offers various subscription plans, which may include:
cgvPage.section1_2Text2: Some plans may include limited promotional content (e.g., sponsored messages or editorial recommendations related to PickMyNews).
cgvPage.section1_2Text3: Available features may vary depending on the plan chosen and will be specified during registration or in any corresponding communication.
cgvPage.section1_3Text1: Some subscriptions may be offered by third parties (platforms, partners) in connection with their own services. These subscriptions may have specific conditions, communicated during registration.
cgvPage.section1_3Text2: Details of your subscription are accessible from your PickMyNews personal space.
cgvPage.section2Text1: PickMyNews may occasionally offer promotional offers (free trials, discounts, promotional codes, etc.). PickMyNews reserves the right to revoke an offer in case of ineligibility.
cgvPage.section2Text2: Eligibility may be determined based on information such as: email, device, payment method, or subscription history.
cgvPage.section2Text3: Specific conditions for each offer are communicated during registration.
cgvPage.section3_1Text1: PickMyNews subscription fees will be charged to your payment method on the billing date shown in your "Account" section. The cycle duration depends on the plan chosen (weekly, monthly, or annual).
cgvPage.section3_1Text2: Your billing date may be changed, including:
section3_1Items: if your subscription started on a day that doesn't exist every month.
cgvPage.section3_2Text1: To use PickMyNews, you must provide one or more valid payment methods. You authorize us to charge any payment method associated with your account if the primary method is declined.
cgvPage.section3_2Text2: In case of payment failure and no cancellation, we may suspend access to the service until payment is made.
cgvPage.section3_2Text3: Some payment methods may incur additional fees (bank fees, foreign transactions). This is the responsibility of your payment provider.
cgvPage.section3_3Text: You can update your payment methods in your "Account" section. Following an automatic update by your provider, you authorize us to continue charges on the updated payment method.
cgvPage.section3_4Text1: You can terminate your PickMyNews subscription at any time. Your access remains active until the end of the current period.
cgvPage.section3_4Text2: Payments are non-refundable and no refund or credit is given for partially used periods or unviewed content.
cgvPage.section3_4Text3: Termination is done through your "Account" section.
cgvPage.section3_4Text4: If you subscribed through a third party, you must cancel through that third party (e.g., via App Store, third-party Stripe Billing, etc.).
cgvPage.section3_5Text1: PickMyNews may change its prices or plans, including due to:
cgvPage.section3_5Text2: Any change will be announced at least one month in advance. If you refuse the change, you can terminate your subscription before it takes effect.
cgvPage.section4_1Text: You must be at least 18 years old to subscribe to PickMyNews. Minors may use the service under adult supervision.
cgvPage.section4_2Text1: PickMyNews content is reserved for internal use within the client organization. Any external redistribution requires prior authorization.
cgvPage.section4_2Text2: We grant you a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable right to access the content as part of your service contract.
cgvPage.section4_3Text1: PickMyNews content is primarily accessible in the country where you established your account, unless specifically restricted by local legislation.
cgvPage.section4_3Text2: Content availability may vary depending on your location and may be changed at any time.
cgvPage.section4_4Text: The content and features of the PickMyNews service are regularly updated. We do not guarantee the permanent availability of any particular content.
cgvPage.section4_5Text1: Unless expressly authorized, you agree not to:
section4_5Items: reproduce, distribute, modify, or use PickMyNews content;
use robots, scrapers, or automated scripts;
attempt to decompile or misuse our software;
inject code or interfere with our platform;
use our service or data to train or evaluate artificial intelligence models, automated systems, or similar technologies.
cgvPage.section4_5Text2: We may suspend or terminate your access in case of violation.
section4_6Items: the quality of your Internet connection;
your filtering settings (spam, automatic rules, etc.).
cgvPage.section4_6Text2: PickMyNews cannot guarantee delivery on all technical environments.
cgvPage.section4_7Text: The PickMyNews software, developed by or for PickMyNews, can only be used to access the service. We may automatically deploy updates.
cgvPage.section5Text1: Your password is strictly personal and must remain confidential. Anyone with access to your account is deemed to be acting on your behalf.
cgvPage.section5Text2: You must maintain accurate and up-to-date information in your account.
cgvPage.section5Text3: We may suspend or close your account in case of suspected fraud or identity theft.
cgvPage.section6_1Text: PickMyNews does not accept unsolicited ideas or content and is not responsible for any similarities between proposed content and content sent to PickMyNews.
cgvPage.section6_2Text: For any assistance, you can consult our help center or contact us via the support email indicated on the website.
cgvPage.section6_3Text: If any provision is deemed invalid, the others remain fully applicable.
cgvPage.section6_4Text1: PickMyNews may modify these Terms, including to:
cgvPage.section6_4Text2: In case of substantial change, you will be notified at least one month before it takes effect.
cgvPage.section6_5Text: All communications related to your account will be sent electronically (email, website interface).
